speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. So you all go into your mist forms and begin to follow after Lionel's lead. As you guys coast over the upper areas of Ank'harel, it's a beautiful view looking down at this gorgeous city, just this glittering jewel of color and architecture, one of the older cities in Exandria that portions of it seem to have survived elements of the Age of Arcanum and the Calamity, and one of the first societies to spring up thereafter. And it's beautiful to see this history, far longer than that of Tal'Dorei, or at least the human societies of Tal'Dorei, just standing obstinate against the dark oppression of the surrounding desert. You continue to head in that direction, with you leading. Lionel, I need you to roll a survival check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We can camp it up if we need to.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It'll take more than a day to get there anyway, so this way we'll just save some time and we'll take a day to take a look around.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Let's go!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Lionel, this is really awesome. For real, you're going to like this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ready? Ready? Everybody join hands, join hands, join hands.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do we have to join hands for this?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We don't at all. Not at all.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: Can we still do it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Poof!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, you guys feel a warm, magical effect go through you. As you're concentrating, consider yourself being a cloud, you are the cloud. You open your eyes, Lionel, and you look, and you are a fucking cloud! You're like 20 feet up!

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: Oh, check this out! (spits)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you do that, you watch as more cloud spit goes (fft) and just more cloud. Your body is moisture. When you try and talk, it just goes (exhale).

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: So you can't really talk.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Can't really talk. You're a cloud. So if you wanted to, you could spend a minute to concentrate and revert back, and you can do that-- you have an eight-hour period where you can just turn back and forth.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We should probably concentrate for just a minute. I'm gonna turn back, just so I can shout out, we should all follow-- you know how to get there, right, Lionel?

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: (wind noises)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Bob up and down if it's a yes. Okay. We're going to follow you, all right? And when it's ready to land, then just hover down, and we'll all follow your lead.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: (fart sound) (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's totally normal. We all do it. All right.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I would like you all to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Matt only has to manage 22 individual characters right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, it's great, guys. I love it; it's wonderful.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So when we tell you which direction we want to go, Matt, it's from your perspective.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, do the best you can to see.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The map's right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Towards and away from the ziggurat, and the ziggurat's 12:00 and we're 6:00.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We'll just say leeward and windward. Starboard.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so. There is a singular figure standing up here that seems to be giving orders and shouting it out to the side. Female voice rings out across the center of the chamber and says, "Remnants, slay the intruders and grant their bodies to the cause!"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I see whose voice that was?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That was crazy. 27.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 27. It's hard to see. She's in the dark right there and the sphere doesn't give a lot of light, but the voice sounds familiar.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Familiar?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so at this point the woman pulls an amulet. The woman pulls an amulet out from beneath the robe, and as she clutches it in her hand, the orb shifts from black to white, to a white-gray color, and you watch as the wind (whoosh) gets whipped up even heavier and lights up the area around the space. You watch as the cloaked hood flows back, and for a brief moment, before the grin crawls across her face, you see the face of Delilah Briarwood. (gasps)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We killed her! She's dead!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Look at Percy.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: She's dead. She died. We killed her!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh no.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yet there she is at the top of the ziggurat.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How?!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is like a soap opera!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Dun dun dun!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I broke the world for you returns!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I need you to roll a d20. Add your charisma modifier.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct. Mark that off.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, it's the big motherfucker. The minotaur.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, smite?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The second strike is going to hit you again. He's going to burn another slot for another smite. On the second one, you take another four points of slashing damage, plus 13 points of radiant damage to you. This would be necrotic damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: From the skeleton minotaur?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, this is from the armored guy.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Gotcha. Okay. We've got to get you out of there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And the third strike hits you for four points of slashing and a third dark smite. Another 13 points of necrotic damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That brings me exactly to zero.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You drop your form.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I drop form. Just form. I tanked that motherfucking fight, y'all.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So at that point, all of a sudden your form drops in place.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm still on the ceiling, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, you are. The war priest across the way is going to look outward and begin to focus and chant under his breath, and the little bit of light begins to show, once again, the missing eye on most of these individuals. Delilah is not missing an eye, it seems, but the rest of them seem to have this appearance amongst them. As it releases this form of energy, you watch as a familiar, darker-burning flame begins to spill across the ceiling as a Flame Strike makes its way-- not a Fire Storm, Flame Strike. Sorry, so it's a column.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Am I close to him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan is-- it's a 60-foot range, is what you're asking? Yes, it is.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll Counterspell that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Counterspell the Flame Strike?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I missed you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's so nice that this is not a problem.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Ceiling and floor, because it's a large enough radius where it affects the entire space. I need you guys to roll a constitution saving throw for me, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm still on the ceiling, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, you are. The war priest across the way is going to look outward and begin to focus and chant under his breath, and the little bit of light begins to show, once again, the missing eye on most of these individuals. Delilah is not missing an eye, it seems, but the rest of them seem to have this appearance amongst them. As it releases this form of energy, you watch as a familiar, darker-burning flame begins to spill across the ceiling as a Flame Strike makes its way-- not a Fire Storm, Flame Strike. Sorry, so it's a column.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Am I close to him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan is-- it's a 60-foot range, is what you're asking? Yes, it is.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll Counterspell that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Counterspell the Flame Strike?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I missed you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's so nice that this is not a problem.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I need you to roll a d20. Add your charisma modifier.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's just a plus two? Oh, wait. Wrong guy! Ooh, 19.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 19 will do it. With that, as the flames begin to well out in this column of fire and dark divine energy, you just reach out and snap your fingers and the spell vanishes on the spot.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Shorthalt.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Shorthalt.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Shorthalt!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't feel the love! I need to go away for another year.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's a start.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That necromancer, however, is going to impact in the center of the chamber a burst of necrotic energy that billows out from the center in a 60-foot radius. It's going to affect all of you guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Me up in the corner?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Everyone but you because you're away. Mr. Way Out of the Way Guy.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's what I do.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ceiling and floor?
